allow: Bash(nvim --headless --noplugin -n -u NONE --cmd 'lua package.path = "lua/?.lua;" .. package.path' --cmd 'lua require\("tomltools.lsp.server.completion"\); require\("tomltools.toml.schema_util"\); print\("OK: modules load"\)' --cmd quit)

Bash(nvim --headless --noplugin -n -u NONE --cmd 'lua package.path="lua/?.lua;"..package.path' --cmd 'lua local c=require\("tomltools.lsp.server.completion"\); local n=require\("tomltools.toml.schema_nav"\); local u=require\("tomltools.toml.schema_util"\); assert\(n.gather_table_paths and n.gather_array_table_paths and not u.gather_table_paths and not u.flatten_union\); print\("OK: modules load, gather moved to schema_nav"\)' --cmd quit)
